channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Three Former TMC Rajya Sabha MPs Switch Allegiances to BJP Amid Factional Struggles
item.description: Three former Trinamool Congress (TMC) Rajya Sabha members—Sushmita Dev, Prakash Chik Baraik, and Sukhendu Sekhar Roy—have officially joined the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), marking a significant shif...

item.title: Kenya Power to Conduct Scheduled Power Outages on July 10
item.description: Kenya Power has announced planned power outages scheduled for Friday, July 10, affecting various regions across the country. The national electricity distributor shared the notice through its official...

item.title: Iranians mourn Khamenei at his funeral amid regional tensions
item.description: The funeral of assassinated Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei in Mashhad has drawn massive crowds, with mourners demanding revenge against perceived aggressors. The burial, held in the Shrine of Ima...

item.title: Pogacar wins Tourmalet stage to take overall lead from Traeen
item.description: Tadej Pogacar secured a solo victory on the grueling Col du Tourmalet during the sixth stage of the 2026 Tour de France, reclaiming the overall lead from Torstein Traeen. The Slovenian rider's decisiv...

item.title: Criticism of Water Company CEO's Bonus Amid Environmental Concerns and Customer Complaints
item.description: Steve Crawford, a former surfing school operator in Scarborough, expressed outrage over Yorkshire Water's CEO Nicola Shaw receiving an additional £660,000 payment from parent company Kelda Holdings. C...

item.title: FIFA President Gianni Infantino Faces Scrutiny Over Red Card Decision and Political Ties
item.description: The article examines the controversy surrounding FIFA President Gianni Infantino's handling of a red card incident during a match, which sparked accusations of political bias. It highlights how Infant...

item.title: 6D Lotto Bettor Wins P8.7M Jackpot in PCSO Draw
item.description: A lone bettor secured the P8.7 million jackpot prize in the PCSO's 6D Lotto draw on July 9, 2026, by correctly guessing the winning numbers 1-8-6-4-9-4 in exact order. The odds of winning the jackpot ...

item.title: ISWAP militants attack military base, burn police station and public buildings in Borno
item.description: A group of militants linked to ISWAP launched an attack on a military base in northern Borno state, resulting in casualties and the destruction of civilian infrastructure. The attackers burned down a ...

item.title: Egypt Calls for FIFA Investigation Following World Cup Match Controversy
item.description: The article discusses Egypt's demand for an investigation into FIFA's handling of the controversial officiating in the Egypt vs Argentina World Cup match. Ishaan Tharoor, a Global Affairs Columnist at...

item.title: Waterloo Region Challenges Court Ruling on Encampment Decision
item.description: The Region of Waterloo has appealed a court ruling that allowed the continuation of an encampment, arguing that the judge made multiple errors in his decision. The appeal centers on the judge's interp...

item.title: President Tinubu submits secondary education reform bill for Senate approval
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has sent the National Secondary Education Commission (Amendment) Bill, 2026 to the Senate for approval, aiming to improve the management of public senior secondary education in N...

item.title: The Age's Superquiz Puzzle Challenge
item.description: The Age's Superquiz is a daily puzzle challenge offering readers a chance to test their knowledge with a variety of themed quizzes. The July 10 edition features a Mini Crossword puzzle with ten clues ...

item.title: IEBC Probes Voter Bribery and Violence in Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) is investigating serious allegations of voter bribery, illegal campaigning, and security threats in the Ol Kalou by-election. Chairperson Era...

item.title: Weekly puzzle challenge features Mini Crossword and interactive quizzes
item.description: The article promotes a weekly Superquiz puzzle series offering interactive challenges for subscribers. It highlights the Mini Crossword puzzle with ten clues and twenty-five squares, encouraging users...

item.title: Foreign national arrested over Western Cape robbery spree and possession of stolen firearms
item.description: A 32-year-old foreign national was arrested following a high-speed police chase on the N2 Road in Somerset West, linked to multiple house robberies across the Western Cape. The suspect's vehicle, a gr...

item.title: Trump's Energy Policies Projected to Cost Consumers $650 Billion by 2040
item.description: A nonpartisan think tank, Energy Innovation, warns that Trump's rollback of clean energy policies will cost American consumers an additional $650 billion in energy bills by 2040. The analysis highligh...

item.title: Dangote Industries Selects Kenya for USD 19 Billion East Africa Oil Refinery Project
item.description: Dangote Industries has finalized its decision to build a 700,000 bpd oil refinery in Kenya, specifically on Lamu Island, marking a significant shift from initial plans to locate the project in Tanzani...

item.title: Reform UK Faces Financial Scrutiny Amid Allegations of Misconduct
item.description: The article details the financial controversies surrounding Reform UK, led by Nigel Farage, following revelations of a £5m gift reported to the National Crime Agency (NCA) over money laundering concer...

item.title: Ontario Court Strikes Down Air Travel Complaint Confidentiality Clause
item.description: An Ontario Superior Court judge has ruled that regulations preventing travellers from sharing outcomes of passenger complaints with Canada’s transport regulator violate Canadians’ Charter rights to fr...

item.title: Insurers urged to build trust and improve education to boost insurance uptake in Tanzania
item.description: The insurance industry in Tanzania has been called upon to prioritize building public trust, enhancing customer education, and developing products that address real risks to increase insurance uptake....
